emails.subject: FW: MDEA Comments
emails.body: FW: MDEA Comments To: Morse, Brad; Rorschach, Reagan

emails.subject: MDEA Comments
emails.body: MDEA Comments Kay I just spoke with Marvin, he seems pretty happy--just a few comments so far: the arbitration/dispute resolution clause needs to reflect what is in the LOI weekends are not included in the definition of off-peak hours Marvin, David and Robert are still reviewing and look to have additional comments by early next week. Reagan

emails.subject: Re: MDEA Comments
emails.body: Re: MDEA Comments Way c ool. From: Reagan Rorschach/ENRON@enronXgate on 04/13/2001 11:36 AM
